title: validate_url_path_component in gcp-sm is misleadingly named
description: The function name implies it validates URL path encoding, but it actually validates GCP resource name characters ([A-Za-z0-9_-]). URL path components can contain many more chars (percent-encoded, slashes, etc). The name will mislead anyone who uses it as a reference for writing a similar validator. Should be renamed to validate_gcp_resource_name_component or similar.
